evals.prompt:
Prepare market data for backtesting with this configuration:

data_config:
  start_date: "2024-01-01"
  end_date: "2025-12-31"
  universe: "jp_stocks_300"
  data_sources:
    - name: "j_quants"
      fields: ["open", "high", "low", "close", "volume"]

split_config:
  train_end_date: "2025-06-30"
  eval_start_date: "2025-07-01"

Load data, clean (handle missing/duplicates), calculate returns/volatility, split into train/eval, validate quality. Return dataset paths and quality report per SKILL.md.
evals.expected_output: JSON object with train_dataset (path, period, shape), eval_dataset (path, period, shape), quality_report (missing_rate, coverage, continuity checks), and metadata. Missing rate <8%, coverage >95%.
